query:
-- 检查订单表中是否有老师的城市信息
SELECT 
  o.teacherName,
  c.name as city_name,
  COUNT(*) as order_count
FROM orders o
JOIN cities c ON o.cityId = c.id
WHERE o.teacherName IS NOT NULL AND o.teacherName != ''
GROUP BY o.teacherName, c.name
ORDER BY o.teacherName, order_count DESC
LIMIT 20;
